message:
test(demo): add snapshot baselines for new screens and features

Async tasks snapshots:
- Initial, after ticks, spawn task, cancel task, retry failed
- Vim navigation, cycle policy, many tasks, navigate down
- Multiple viewport sizes (80x24, 120x40, 40x10, 200x50)

Log search snapshots:
- Initial, with query, bar open, filter mode, scrolled
- Regex mode, case sensitive, context lines, match navigation
- High contrast highlight, paused, no results, tiny/wide viewports

Virtualized search snapshots:
- Initial, with query, after scroll, page down, end key
- No matches, multiple viewport sizes

Mouse playground snapshots:
- Initial, overlay on, jitter stats, clear log
- Multiple viewport sizes

Modal dialog snapshots:
- Center, offset, constrained, custom position
- Stack z-order, backdrop opacity, alert/confirm/prompt

Form validation and drag-drop snapshots included.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
